title: KAPP-Sen TMC: Pancreas Donor Acceptance Criteria
steps: Both sexes Age > 18 years All ethnicities

HTN with end-organ damage BMI > 35 GFR < 60 ml/min/1.73 m2 Known cardiovascular disease Pancreatitis Active malignancy Chronic pulmonary, hepatic, infectious, gastrointestinal, endocrine, neurologic, or inflammatory disease Chronic use of systemic steroids Use of agents with senolytic activity
